name: Exclude docs from npm package
summary: Removed `docs` from `package.json` files field to cut ~100 KB compressed bloat.
detail: The `docs/` directory contained 38 internal Chinese engineering notes with zero runtime value for CLI users. Removing it saved ~8% compressed size, is fully reversible, and leaves the repo intact for contributors.
content: The `docs/` directory contained 38 internal Chinese engineering notes with zero runtime value for CLI users. Removing it saved ~8% compressed size, is fully reversible, and leaves the repo intact for contributors.

name: npm pack size baseline
summary: Before: 1.2 MB compressed / 5.6 MB unpacked / 757 files. After: 1.1 MB / 5.3 MB / 719 files.
detail: Established baseline for `@pencil-agent/nano-pencil`. Other bloat noted but kept: `.d.ts` declarations (needed for SDK consumers) and minor `soul-core/src/` duplicates.
content: Established baseline for `@pencil-agent/nano-pencil`. Other bloat noted but kept: `.d.ts` declarations (needed for SDK consumers) and minor `soul-core/src/` duplicates.

name: nanoPencil print mode
summary: Non-interactive mode for scripting/piping, uses AgentSession core without TUI.
detail: Print mode runs once, reads from stdin or --prompt flag, outputs to stdout. Internal flow: cli.ts -> main.ts -> modes/print/print-mode.ts -> AgentSession -> stdout. Designed for automation and piping.
content: Print mode runs once, reads from stdin or --prompt flag, outputs to stdout. Internal flow: cli.ts -> main.ts -> modes/print/print-mode.ts -> AgentSession -> stdout. Designed for automation and piping.
